title.en: Lively start between Colombia & Portugal as DR Congo equaliser ruled out LIVE!
title.zh-CN: 在刚果民主共和国均衡器现场排除的情况下，在哥伦比亚和葡萄牙之间热闹地开始！

title.en: Croatia overcome Ghana to finish as runners-up to England
title.zh-CN: 克罗地亚战胜加纳，成为英格兰的亚军

summary.en: Croatia sealed their spot as Group L runners-up after a 2-1 win over Ghana in Philadelphia.
summary.zh-CN: 克罗地亚在费城以2比1战胜加纳后，锁定了L组亚军的位置。

title.en: Iran head coach calls for Infantino to stand up to United States
title.zh-CN: 伊朗主教练呼吁因凡蒂诺与美国对抗

title.en: Clarke steps down as Scotland manager after World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: 世界杯退出后，克拉克辞去苏格兰经理职务

summary.en: Steve Clarke resigns as Scotland head coach following the nation's group exit from the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 在国家队退出世界杯后，史蒂夫·克拉克辞去了苏格兰主教练的职务。

title.en: Who had the X-factor and who had a tough game? England player ratings
title.zh-CN: 谁有X因素，谁有艰难的比赛？英格兰球员评分

summary.en: BBC Sport's England reporter Alex Howell rates the players after the Three Lions'  win over Panama in the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台的英格兰记者亚历克斯·豪威尔（ Alex Howell ）在三狮队在世界杯上战胜巴拿马后对球员进行了

title.en: Who could England face in last 32 after qualifying for next round?
title.zh-CN: 在获得下一轮资格后，英格兰队在过去的32场比赛中可以面对谁？

summary.en: England secure top spot in group L and a World Cup last 32 tie against a third-placed team with a 2-0 win over Panama on Saturday.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队在L组中获得第一名，世界杯最后32场比赛对阵第三名的球队，周六以2-0战胜巴拿马队。

title.en: England labour past Panama to qualify for last 32 as group winners
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队超越巴拿马队，有资格获得最后32场小组赛冠军

summary.en: Goals from Jude Bellingham and Harry Kane help England secure a 2-0 win over Panama, as Thomas Tuchel's side qualify for the World Cup last 32 as winners of Group L.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆和哈里·凯恩的进球帮助英格兰队以2比0战胜巴拿马队，因为托马斯·图切尔的球队有资格作为L组的冠军参加世界杯。

title.en: Scotland's elimination from World Cup confirmed
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰被淘汰出世界杯

summary.en: Scotland are out of the 2026 World Cup as they are unable to finish the group stage as one of the eight best third-placed teams.
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰没有参加2026年世界杯，因为他们无法作为八支最好的第三名球队之一完成小组赛。

title.en: What each team needs to reach World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 每支球队进入世界杯淘汰赛所需的条件

summary.en: With the final round of group fixtures nearing a conclusion the path to the World Cup final on 19 July is starting to take shape.
summary.zh-CN: 随着最后一轮小组赛接近尾声，通往7月19日世界杯决赛的道路开始成形。

title.en: 'Huge relief' - Bellingham puts England ahead against Panama
title.zh-CN: “巨大的救济” -贝灵厄姆让英格兰队领先于巴拿马队

summary.en: Jude Bellingham does enough to get just ahead of his defender and poke the ball home from Bukayo's Saka corner and put England ahead against Panama.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝灵汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）做了足够的事情来领先他的后卫，从布卡约（ Bukayo ）的萨卡（ Saka ）角落将球戳回主场，让英格兰队

title.en: Kane breaks England World Cup goals record to double lead against Panama
title.zh-CN: 凯恩打破英格兰世界杯进球纪录，双双领先巴拿马

summary.en: Harry Kane scores the 11th World Cup goal of his career to overtake Gary Lineker as England's all-time top scorer in the competition, as England take a 2-0 lead against Panama in their final Group L...
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）在他职业生涯的第11个世界杯进球中超越加里·莱因克尔（ Gary Lineker ） ，成为英格兰历史上的最佳射手，因为英格兰队在最后一场比赛中以2比0领先巴拿马队。

title.en: Kane hails 'very versatile' Bellingham after Panama win
title.zh-CN: 凯恩在巴拿马获胜后称赞“非常多才多艺”的贝灵厄姆

summary.en: Harry Kane praises Jude Bellingham's ability to thrive when he has the freedom to "attack the game" after the midfielder set up a goal for the England captain, and scored one himself, in the 2-0 win...
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）称赞裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）有能力茁壮成长，因为他在中场为英格兰队长设定了一个进球，并在2-0的胜利中自己打入了一个进球后，他有自由“进攻比赛”。

title.en: One night in Miami: The Scotsmen of the apocalypse
title.zh-CN: 迈阿密一夜：世界末日的苏格兰人

summary.en: BBC Scotland's Scott Mullen paints the scene from Miami as Scotland's World Cup hopes fade.
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰BBC的斯科特·马伦（ Scott Mullen ）描绘了迈阿密的场景，苏格兰世界杯的希望逐渐消失。

title.en: 'Nothing is impossible' - Cape Verde make history to set up Argentina tie
title.zh-CN: “没有什么是不可能的” -佛得角创造历史，建立阿根廷领带

summary.en: How has a group of islands with just 525,000 inhabitants made it to the knockout rounds of the World Cup?
summary.zh-CN: 一群只有52.5万居民的岛屿是如何进入世界杯淘汰赛的？

title.en: 'I leave nothing' - the end of 'toxic' Bielsa's Uruguay reign
title.zh-CN: “我什么都不留下” - “有毒” Bielsa的乌拉圭统治的终结

summary.en: With Uruguay eliminated from the 2026 World Cup, BBC Sport looks at what has gone wrong for them under colourful coach Marcelo Bielsa.
summary.zh-CN: 随着乌拉圭被淘汰出2026年世界杯， BBC体育台在色彩缤纷的教练马塞洛·别尔萨（ Marcelo Bielsa ）的带领下审视了他们出了什么问题。

summary.en: Cape Verde deliver a valiant performance to earn their third draw of the group stage, a result that means they qualify for the last 32 in their World Cup debut while Saudi Arabia crash out.

summary.en: Jubilation and tears among Cape Verde fans and players as they confirm their 'miracle' qualification for the last 32 of the World Cup after earning a point against Saudi Arabia in Houston.
